name: Magna Centipede
description:
Centipede is a minor antagonist from Megaman X2. Based on a centipede, he is a Reploid and former Maverick Hunter who was kidnapped during Sigma's first rebellion and later brainwashed as a Maverick. He now occupies a central computer system trying to transmit the Maverick virus across the world.

His body is humanoid in shape albeit he had a second set of arms and had rounded segments connected to his back like those of a centipede including short spiked protrusions. As a Reploid he is fully robotic with his head, shoulders, arms and legs being pink as well as parts of the centipede tail while his biceps and thighs are black. On the sides of his head are green bulb lenses resembling bug eyes with his real eyes being red, he also pincers on the sides of his covered mouth.

Given his attack style, he prefers attacking in the same manner as a ninja. He can use short range teleportation, throwing shurikens and make use of gravity manipulation such as using the centipede tail to draw in his opponent with Magnet Mine, doing so also afflicts a robotic target with the Maverick virus.
creator: AnimeMan1993
